race.name: Pandora's Box of Rox
race.tagline: Come play, run, and feel like a kid again!

course.terrain: Trail running through meadows, creek crossings, scenic overlooks, and granite domes
highlights: Largest granite domes in the area
course.post_race: After party under the shade of the lakeside pavilion with food truck goodness, games, swimming pool next to the finisher chute, and community celebration

overview.description: Join your friends at one of the largest and most exciting, locally owned and operated trail runs around! With unrivaled course markings; unique swag; fully-stocked aid stations; and exhilarating scenery; come play, run, and feel like a kid again!
features: Beginner friendly distances (8 mile and 4 mile runs)
Super tough long distance options (1/2 marathon, full marathon, double marathon)
Largest and most exciting trail runs in the area

venue_details.nearby_towns: Close to Austin, Burnet, and other Hill Country communities

race_info.course_marking: Unrivaled course markings for easy navigation

waiver.note: Everyone who enters onto the ranch must fill out a waiver. Racers, spectators, everyone. Save some time by printing it off, signing, and bringing it with you.
